title: Updates feed as widget in item card view
excerpt: I’m finding the (newish?) Item Card view to be a useful way to distill information about an item for my team members. At the moment, they have to toggle back and forth between the “Updates” view and the “Item Card” view.…

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m finding the (newish?) Item Card view to be a useful way to distill information about an item for my team members. At the moment, they have to toggle back and forth between the “Updates” view and the “Item Card” view. It would be great to be able to add the Updates feed as a widget in the item card view, so that everything is all in the same place.
